title: Easy Daily Task Tracker

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Easy Daily Task Tracker

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'><rect x='0' y='0' width='400' height='300' fill='#090a0f'/><text x='20' y='30' fill='#ffffff' font-size='24'>Task Tracker</text><rect x='20' y='70' width='200' height='20' fill='#C06C88'/><text x='25' y='95' fill='#ffffff' font-size='18'>Username</text><rect x='20' y='120' width='200' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD'/><text x='25' y='145' fill='#000000' font-size='18'>Password</text><rect x='20' y='180' width='80' height='20' fill='#411C56'/><text x='25' y='205' fill='#ffffff' font-size='18'>Submit</text><rect x='120' y='70' width='200' height='200' fill='#090a0f'/><text x='125' y='70' fill='#ffffff' font-size='24'>Tasks</text><text x='125' y='120' fill='#000000' font-size='18' x='125'>Task 1</text><text x='125' y='140' fill='#000000' font-size='18'>Task 2</text></svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Tasks list should update upon adding a new task
Form should have a simple validation (username and password cannot be empty)

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Easy Daily Task Tracker

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify that the form has a simple validation for empty fields (username and password).
Verify that the task list updates upon adding a new task.
